# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure IAM Role for Cross-Account CI/CD Access with Explicit Account Allowlist'

Parameters:
  TrustedAccountIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of AWS Account IDs allowed to assume this role'
    AllowedPattern: '^(\d{12})(,\d{12})*$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be a comma-separated list of 12-digit AWS Account IDs'
  
  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Description: 'External ID for additional security (shared secret between accounts)'
    MinLength: 8
    MaxLength: 1224
    NoEcho: true
    AllowedPattern: '^[\w+=,.@:\/-]*$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must contain only alphanumeric characters and +=,.@:/-'

  RoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'CrossAccountCICDRole'
    Description: 'Name of the IAM role'
    AllowedPattern: '^[\w+=,.@-]+$'
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 64

  MaxSessionDuration:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3600
    MinValue: 3600
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: 'Maximum session duration in seconds (1-12 hours)'

Conditions:
  HasExternalId: !Not [!Equals [!Ref ExternalId, '']]

Resources:
  CICDCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref RoleName
      Description: 'Secure cross-account role for CI/CD operations with explicit account allowlist'
      MaxSessionDuration: !Ref MaxSessionDuration
      
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'AllowAssumeRoleFromTrustedAccounts'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Split
                - ','
                - !Sub
                  - 'arn:aws:iam::${inner}:root'
                  - inner: !Join
                      - ':root,arn:aws:iam::'
                      - !Ref TrustedAccountIds
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'sts:ExternalId': !If
                  - HasExternalId
                  - !Ref ExternalId
                  - !Ref AWS::NoValue
              IpAddress:
                'aws:SourceIp':
                  - '0.0.0.0/0'
              StringLike:
                'aws:PrincipalArn': 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/*CICD*'
      
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess'
      
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'CICDDeploymentPermissions'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: 'AllowS3DeploymentOperations'
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:GetObjectVersion'
                  - 's3:DeleteObject'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-cicd-artifacts/*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-deployment-*/*'
              
              - Sid: 'AllowCloudFormationOperations'
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DeleteStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackResources'
                  - 'cloudformation:GetTemplate'
                  - 'cloudformation:ValidateTemplate'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/cicd-*/*'
              
              - Sid: 'AllowLambdaDeployment'
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionCode'
                  - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration'
                  - 'lambda:PublishVersion'
                  - 'lambda:CreateAlias'
                  - 'lambda:UpdateAlias'
                  - 'lambda:GetFunction'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:cicd-*'
              
              - Sid: 'AllowECSDeployment'
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ecs:UpdateService'
                  - 'ecs:DescribeServices'
                  - 'ecs:DescribeTaskDefinition'
                  - 'ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:service/cicd-*/*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:task-definition/cicd-*:*'
              
              - Sid: 'AllowECROperations'
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
                  - 'ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability'
                  - 'ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer'
                  - 'ecr:BatchGetImage'
                  - 'ecr:PutImage'
                  - 'ecr:InitiateLayerUpload'
                  - 'ecr:UploadLayerPart'
                  - 'ecr:CompleteLayerUpload'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecr:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:repository/cicd-*'
              
              - Sid: 'DenyDangerousActions'
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'iam:CreateUser'
                  - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
                  - 'iam:DeleteUser'
                  - 'iam:DeleteRole'
                  - 'iam:PutUserPolicy'
                  - 'iam:AttachUserPolicy'
                  - 'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy'
                  - 'organizations:*'
                  - 'account:*'
                Resource: '*'
      
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: 'CI/CD Cross-Account Access'
        - Key: SecurityLevel
          Value: 'High'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: 'CloudFormation'

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the cross-account CI/CD role'
    Value: !GetAtt CICDCrossAccountRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn'
  
  RoleName:
    Description: 'Name of the cross-account CI/CD role'
    Value: !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleName'
  
  TrustedAccounts:
    Description: 'List of trusted AWS Account IDs'
    Value: !Join [', ', !Ref TrustedAccountIds]
